items.title: I’m building a solo D&D-inspired RPG
items.description: A quick look at the core screens of Divergentum: character, inventory, choices, and the adventure flow. Divergentum is a solo 5e-inspired fantasy RPG where you create a hero, choose your own actions, and the Dungeon Master responds.
items.pinnedComment: This is the first quick interface look. If you try Divergentum, tell me what kind of character you created.
onScreenText: I wanted a D&D-style game I could play alone.

items.title: Choose your origin in Divergentum
items.description: Eight fantasy races, one solo adventure. This short shows the character portrait and race-choice vibe for Divergentum, a solo 5e-inspired fantasy RPG.
items.pinnedComment: Which race would you start with?

items.title: A wizard alone against the horde
items.description: When the monsters arrive, the spellbook opens. A short class-fantasy clip from Divergentum, a solo 5e-inspired RPG.
items.pinnedComment: Would you play Wizard first or save magic for later?

items.title: Choose your first hero: Fighter
items.description: Steel, grit, and simple decisions that become complicated fast. Fighter class fantasy from Divergentum.
items.pinnedComment: Fighter is the honest answer. Would you start here?

items.title: Bad decisions in dark rooms
items.description: Rogue class fantasy for players who like danger, shortcuts, locked doors, and suspiciously quiet corridors.
items.pinnedComment: Would you sneak past the danger or make it worse?

items.title: The forest always has another answer
items.description: Druid class fantasy from Divergentum: nature, old magic, and a solo adventure that can turn strange very quickly.

items.title: A sword, an oath, and absolutely no chill
items.description: Paladin class fantasy from Divergentum: heroic, stubborn, and probably walking directly toward the problem.

items.title: Divergentum 1.0 is live
items.description: Divergentum 1.0 is live: a solo 5e-inspired fantasy RPG with character choices, inventory, skills, and a responsive Dungeon Master.
items.pinnedComment: Divergentum 1.0 is live. If you try it, tell me what happened in your first scene.
